```{r}
df_results_sub <- df_results %>%
  filter(score == "anosim_score") %>%
  filter(grepl("^ECODA_highres$|^ECODA_highres_HiTME$", method) & !grepl("scATOMIC|PCA", method)) %>%
  mutate(method = gsub("ECODA_highres_", "", method)) %>%
  mutate(method = gsub("ECODA_highres", "Author annotation", method)) %>%
  # mutate(method = if_else(
  #   grepl("^top_varexp0\\.\\d", method),
  #   paste0(as.integer(gsub("top_varexp0\\.", "", method)) * 10),
  #   method
  # )) %>%
  # mutate(method = gsub("ECODA_highres", "100", method)) %>%
  mutate(method = fct_relevel(method)) %>%
  mutate(method = factor(method, levels = mixedsort(levels(method))))

ds_diffs <- df_results_sub %>%
  group_by(dataset) %>%
  summarize(
    diff = value[method == "HiTME"] - value[method == "Author annotation"]
  ) %>%
  arrange(diff)

ggplot(ds_diffs, aes(x = reorder(dataset, diff), y = diff)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(x = "Dataset", y = "Difference") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 65, hjust = 1)) +
  ggtitle("For each dataset, how does ECODA perform based on\nHiTME annotation vs Author annotation?")
```

## Plot feature selection (HiTME layer3)

```{r fig.height=8, fig.width=12}
df_results_sub <- df_results %>%
  filter(score == "anosim_score") %>%
  filter(grepl("ECODA_hi", method) & !grepl("scATOMIC|PCA", method)) %>%
  mutate(method = gsub("ECODA_highres_", "", method)) %>%
  # mutate(method = if_else(
  #   grepl("^top_varexp0\\.\\d", method),
  #   paste0(as.integer(gsub("top_varexp0\\.", "", method)) * 10),
  #   method
  # )) %>%
  # mutate(method = gsub("ECODA_highres", "100", method)) %>%
  # mutate(method = if_else(
  #   grepl("HiTME_layer3_top_varexp0\\.\\d", method),
  #   paste0("HiTME_layer3_", as.integer(gsub("HiTME_layer3_top_varexp0\\.", "", method)) * 10),
  #   method
  # )) %>%
  # mutate(method = gsub("^HiTME_layer3$", "HiTME_layer3_100", method)) %>%
  mutate(method = gsub("^HiTME$", "HiTME_layer2", method)) %>%
  mutate(method = fct_relevel(method)) %>%
  mutate(method = factor(method, levels = mixedsort(levels(method)))) %>%
  # mutate(method = fct_relevel(method, "HiTME_layer2_100", after = Inf)) %>%
  mutate(method = fct_relevel(method, "HiTME_layer3", after = 5)) #%>%
  # filter(!grepl("varexp0|varcts", method))

p1 <- df_results_sub %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = value)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_se", geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", fill = "gray70") +
  geom_point(position = "identity", alpha = 0.6, size = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(group = dataset), color = "grey20", alpha = 0.2) +
  stat_compare_means(
    ref.group = "All cell types",
    method = "wilcox.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    angle = 25,
    label.y = 0.93,
    aes(label = sprintf("%5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..)))
  ) +
  # ylim(c(0, 1)) +
  labs(x = "Variance explained (%)", y = "ANOSIM score") +
  theme_classic2() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 65, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))
print(p1)
# ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "benchmark_summary_barplot_anosim_ECODAfeatureselectionHVC.pdf"),
#        width = 4,
#        height = 4)

p2 <- df_results_sub %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = n_features)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_se", geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", fill = "gray70") +
  geom_point(position = "identity", alpha = 0.6, size = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(group = dataset), color = "grey20", alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(x = "Variance explained (%)", y = "Number of cell types") +
  theme_classic2() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 65, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))
print(p2)

# Create p1 (the top plot) without x-axis labels
p1_clean <- p1 + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), 
                       axis.text.x = element_blank(),
                       axis.ticks.x = element_blank())

# Combine the plots vertically
combined_plot <- p2 / p1
print(combined_plot)
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "benchmark_summary_barplot_anosim_ECODAandHiTMEfeatureselectionHVC_withNumCT.pdf"),
       width = 5,
       height = 8)
```

## Show example PCAs for publication

```{r fig.height=7, fig.width=7}
for (ds in names(result_list[["bmark"]])) {
  p <- plot_pca(
    result_list[["bmark"]][[ds]][["ECODA_highres"]][["feat_mat"]],
    labels = result_list[["bmark"]][[ds]][["ECODA_highres"]][["plot"]][["data"]][["Groups"]],
    n_ct_show = 5,
    invisible = "quali",
    labelsize = 5
  ) + ggtitle(ds)
  print(p)
}

ds <- "Stephenson"
plot_pca(
    result_list[["bmark"]][[ds]][["ECODA_highres_HiTME_layer3_top_varexp0.9"]][["feat_mat"]],
    labels = result_list[["bmark"]][[ds]][["ECODA_highres_HiTME_layer3_top_varexp0.9"]][["plot"]][["data"]][["Groups"]],
    n_ct_show = 50,
    invisible = "quali",
    labelsize = 3
) + ggtitle(ds)

```

```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=12}

levs <- c(
  "ECODA_high_res",
  "ECODA_low_res",
  "ECODA_deconv",
  "Pseudobulk",
  "MOFA_2_factors",
  "scITD_2_factors",
  "MrVI"
)


plot_list <- lapply(bmark_result_list[["GongSharma_cmv_females"]], function(method) method[["plot"]])
scores <- lapply(bmark_result_list[["GongSharma_cmv_females"]], function(method) method[["scores"]])
scores <- scores[levs]
scores_long <- sapply(scores, unlist) %>% t() %>%  as.data.frame()
scores_long$method <- row.names(scores_long)
scores_long <- scores_long %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(sil_score, mod_score, cluster_score),
    names_to = "score_method",
    values_to = "values"
  )
scores_long$method <- factor(scores_long$method, levels = levs)

score_p <- ggplot(scores_long, aes(x = method, y = values)) +
  # geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=score_method)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group=score_method, linetype=score_method), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  ylim(c(min(scores_long$values, 0), max(scores_long$values))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))

plot_list <- plot_list[!grepl("5_factors|10_factors|dims", names(plot_list))]
plot_list <- plot_list[c(4, 3, 2, 1, 5:7)]
plot_list <- lapply(plot_list, function(x){x + theme(aspect.ratio=1)})
for (p in names(plot_list)){
  plot_list[[p]][["labels"]][["title"]] <- sub("\\nCluster score: .*", "", plot_list[[p]][["labels"]][["title"]])
}
plot_list[["scores"]] <- score_p
p <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plot_list, ncol = 4)
p
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "benchmark_pca_example_GongSharma_cmv_females.pdf"),
       plot = p,
       width = 15,
       height = 7)


plot_list <- lapply(bmark_result_list[["GongSharma_age_females_cmvneg"]], function(method) method[["plot"]])
scores <- lapply(bmark_result_list[["GongSharma_age_females_cmvneg"]], function(method) method[["scores"]])
scores <- scores[levs]
scores_long <- sapply(scores, unlist) %>% t() %>%  as.data.frame()
scores_long$method <- row.names(scores_long)
scores_long <- scores_long %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(sil_score, mod_score, cluster_score),
    names_to = "score_method",
    values_to = "values"
  )
scores_long$method <- factor(scores_long$method, levels = levs)

score_p <- ggplot(scores_long, aes(x = method, y = values)) +
  # geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=score_method)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group=score_method, linetype=score_method), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  ylim(c(min(scores_long$values, 0), max(scores_long$values))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))
plot_list <- plot_list[!grepl("5_factors|10_factors|dims", names(plot_list))]
plot_list <- plot_list[c(4, 3, 2, 1, 5:7)]
plot_list <- lapply(plot_list, function(x){x + theme(aspect.ratio=1)})
for (p in names(plot_list)){
  plot_list[[p]][["labels"]][["title"]] <- sub("\\nCluster score: .*", "", plot_list[[p]][["labels"]][["title"]])
}
plot_list[["scores"]] <- score_p
p <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plot_list, ncol = 4)
p
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "benchmark_pca_example_GongSharma_age_females_cmvneg.pdf"),
       plot = p,
       width = 15,
       height = 7)


plot_list <- lapply(bmark_result_list[["Lee"]], function(method) method[["plot"]])
scores <- lapply(bmark_result_list[["Lee"]], function(method) method[["scores"]])
scores <- scores[levs]
scores_long <- sapply(scores, unlist) %>% t() %>%  as.data.frame()
scores_long$method <- row.names(scores_long)
scores_long <- scores_long %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(sil_score, mod_score, cluster_score),
    names_to = "score_method",
    values_to = "values"
  )
scores_long$method <- factor(scores_long$method, levels = levs)

score_p <- ggplot(scores_long, aes(x = method, y = values)) +
  # geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=score_method)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group=score_method, linetype=score_method), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  ylim(c(min(scores_long$values, 0), max(scores_long$values))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))
plot_list <- plot_list[!grepl("5_factors|10_factors|dims", names(plot_list))]
plot_list <- plot_list[c(4, 3, 2, 1, 5:7)]
plot_list <- lapply(plot_list, function(x){x + theme(aspect.ratio=1)})
for (p in names(plot_list)){
  plot_list[[p]][["labels"]][["title"]] <- sub("\\nCluster score: .*", "", plot_list[[p]][["labels"]][["title"]])
}
plot_list[["scores"]] <- score_p
p <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plot_list, ncol = 4)
p
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "benchmark_pca_example_Lee.pdf"),
       plot = p,
       width = 15,
       height = 7)


plot_list <- lapply(bmark_result_list[["Zhang"]], function(method) method[["plot"]])
scores <- lapply(bmark_result_list[["Zhang"]], function(method) method[["scores"]])
scores <- scores[levs]
scores_long <- sapply(scores, unlist) %>% t() %>%  as.data.frame()
scores_long$method <- row.names(scores_long)
scores_long <- scores_long %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(sil_score, mod_score, cluster_score),
    names_to = "score_method",
    values_to = "values"
  )
scores_long$method <- factor(scores_long$method, levels = levs)

score_p <- ggplot(scores_long, aes(x = method, y = values)) +
  # geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=score_method)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group=score_method, linetype=score_method), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  ylim(c(min(scores_long$values, 0), max(scores_long$values))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))

plot_list <- plot_list[!grepl("5_factors|10_factors|dims", names(plot_list))]
plot_list <- plot_list[c(4, 3, 2, 1, 5:7)]
plot_list <- lapply(plot_list, function(x){x + theme(aspect.ratio=1)})
for (p in names(plot_list)){
  plot_list[[p]][["labels"]][["title"]] <- sub("\\nCluster score: .*", "", plot_list[[p]][["labels"]][["title"]])
}
plot_list[["scores"]] <- score_p
p <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plot_list, ncol = 4)
p
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "benchmark_pca_example_Zhang.pdf"),
       plot = p,
       width = 15,
       height = 7)


plot_list <- lapply(bmark_result_list[["Stephenson"]], function(method) method[["plot"]])
scores <- lapply(bmark_result_list[["Stephenson"]], function(method) method[["scores"]])
scores <- scores[levs]
scores_long <- sapply(scores, unlist) %>% t() %>%  as.data.frame()
scores_long$method <- row.names(scores_long)
scores_long <- scores_long %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(sil_score, mod_score, cluster_score),
    names_to = "score_method",
    values_to = "values"
  )
scores_long$method <- factor(scores_long$method, levels = levs)

score_p <- ggplot(scores_long, aes(x = method, y = values)) +
  # geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=score_method)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group=score_method, linetype=score_method), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  ylim(c(min(scores_long$values, 0), max(scores_long$values))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))

plot_list <- plot_list[!grepl("5_factors|10_factors|dims", names(plot_list))]
plot_list <- plot_list[c(4, 3, 2, 1, 5:7)]
plot_list <- lapply(plot_list, function(x){x + theme(aspect.ratio=1)})
for (p in names(plot_list)){
  plot_list[[p]][["labels"]][["title"]] <- sub("\\nCluster score: .*", "", plot_list[[p]][["labels"]][["title"]])
}
plot_list[["scores"]] <- score_p
p <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plot_list, ncol = 4)
p
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "benchmark_pca_example_Stephenson.pdf"),
       plot = p,
       width = 15,
       height = 7)

```

## Example PCAs for HiTME layer2 vs layer3

```{r}
plot_pca(result_list[["bmark"]][["Adams"]][["ECODA_highres_HiTME_layer3_top_varexp0.1"]][["feat_mat"]],
         labels = result_list[["bmark"]][["Adams"]][["ECODA_highres_HiTME_layer3_top_varexp0.1"]][["plot"]][["data"]][["Groups"]],
         invisible = "quali",
         labelsize = 4
         )
```

```{r}
test <- plist_layer2[[1]]
```

```{r}
plist_layer2 <- list()
for (ds in names(result_list$bmark)) {
  plist_layer2[[ds]] <- plot_pca(
    result_list[["bmark"]][[ds]][["ECODA_highres_HiTME_layer2_top_varexp0.5"]][["feat_mat"]],
    labels = result_list[["bmark"]][[ds]][["ECODA_highres_HiTME_layer2_top_varexp0.5"]]$labels,
    invisible = "quali",
    labelsize = 4,
    title = ds,
    n_ct_show = 5
  )
}

plist_layer3 <- list()
for (ds in names(result_list$bmark)) {
  plist_layer3[[ds]] <- plot_pca(
    result_list[["bmark"]][[ds]][["ECODA_highres_HiTME_layer3_top_varexp0.5"]][["feat_mat"]],
    labels = result_list[["bmark"]][[ds]][["ECODA_highres_HiTME_layer3_top_varexp0.5"]]$labels,
    invisible = "quali",
    labelsize = 4,
    title = ds,
    n_ct_show = 5
  )
}
```

```{r}
ggsave("pca_layer2.pdf", cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plist_layer2, ncol = 3), width = 20, height = 20)
ggsave("pca_layer3.pdf", cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plist_layer3, ncol = 3), width = 20, height = 20)
```

```{r fig.height=8, fig.width=16}
plist_vcts <- list()
for (ds in names(result_list$bmark)) {
  p1 <- result_list[["bmark"]][[ds]][["ECODA_highres_HiTME_layer2"]][["feat_mat"]]%>%
    get_ct_var() %>%
    varmeanplot(title = paste0(ds, " Layer2"), label_points = TRUE)
  p2 <- result_list[["bmark"]][[ds]][["ECODA_highres_HiTME_layer3"]][["feat_mat"]]%>%
    get_ct_var() %>%
    varmeanplot(title = paste0(ds, " Layer3"), label_points = TRUE)
  plist_vcts[[ds]] <- p1 | p2
  print(p1 | p2)
}


```

```{r}
ggsave(filename = "test.pdf", plot = cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = plist_vcts, ncol = 1), width = 20, height = 100, limitsize = FALSE)
```

## Compare layer2 and layer3 by scores

```{r fig.height=8, fig.width=2.5}
filter_methods <- c(
  "ECODA_highres",
  "ECODA_highres_HiTME_layer2_top_varexp0.5",
  "ECODA_highres_HiTME_layer3_top_varexp0.5"
)

for (s in c("anosim_score", "mod_score", "cluster_score")) {
  p <- df_results %>%
    filter(score == s) %>%
    filter(method %in% filter_methods) %>%
    
    ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(method, value, .desc = TRUE, .fun = mean), y = value)) +
    stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_se", geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
    stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", fill = "gray70") +
    geom_point(position = "identity", alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_line(aes(group = dataset), color = "grey20", alpha = 0.2) +
    labs(x = "", y = s) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 65, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
    ggtitle(s)
  print(p)
}
```

## Overlap between HVGs from single-cell and bulk

```{r}
# test <- c()
test_int <- c()
test_anosim <- c()
for (ds in names(datasets)) {
  # test <- c(test, result_list[[ds]][["Pseudobulk_unsup_hvg2000"]][["hvgs_sc_pb_intersect"]])
  test_int <- c(test_int, result_list[["bmark"]][[ds]][["Pseudobulk_unsup_hvg2000"]]$hvgs_sc_pb_intersect)
  test_anosim <- c(test_anosim, result_list[["bmark"]][[ds]][["Pseudobulk_unsup_hvg2000"]]$scores$anosim_score)
}
# plot(test)
plot(test_int, test_anosim)
```

# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# Plot execution times

## Get execution times from R

```{r}
for (ds in names(result_list$bmark)) {
  result_list[["bmark"]][[ds]][["GloScope_hvg2000_pcadims30_sqrtmat"]]$exec_time <- result_list[["bmark"]][[ds]][["GloScope_hvg2000_pcadims30"]]$exec_time
}
```


```{r}
r_exec_times_path <- file.path(getwd(), "data", "r_execution_times.rds")

if (!file.exists(r_exec_times_path)) {
  r_exec_times <- data.frame(
    dataset = character(),
    method = character(),
    time_secs = numeric(),
    n_samples = numeric(),
    n_features = numeric()
  )
  
  bmark_result_list <- result_list[["bmark"]]
  
  ds_test <- names(bmark_result_list)
  
  for (ds in ds_test) {
    for (met in names(bmark_result_list[[ds]])) {
      if ("exec_time" %in% names(bmark_result_list[[ds]][[met]])) {
        temp <- data.frame(
          dataset = ds,
          method = met,
          time_secs = as.numeric(bmark_result_list[[ds]][[met]][["exec_time"]], units = "secs"),
          n_samples = nrow(bmark_result_list[[ds]][[met]][["feat_mat"]]),
          n_features = ncol(bmark_result_list[[ds]][[met]][["feat_mat"]])
        )
        
        r_exec_times <- rbind(r_exec_times, temp)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # r_exec_times$dataset[grepl("GongSharma_all", r_exec_times$dataset)] <- gsub("GongSharma_all", "GongSharma", r_exec_times$dataset[grepl("GongSharma_all", r_exec_times$dataset)])

  saveRDS(object = r_exec_times, r_exec_times_path)
} else {
  r_exec_times <- readRDS(r_exec_times_path)
}
```

## Read execution times from python

```{r}
p_exec_times_path <- file.path(getwd(), "data", "p_execution_times.rds")

if (!file.exists(p_exec_times_path)) {
  p_exec_times <- arrow::read_feather(
    file.path(getwd(), "data", "execution_times.feather")
  ) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  
  p_exec_times$n_samples <- 0
  p_exec_times$n_features <- 0
  
  p_exec_times$dataset[p_exec_times$dataset == "Gongsharma_all"] <- "GongSharma_all"
  p_exec_times <- p_exec_times[!p_exec_times$dataset %in% c("Gongsharma_sex_young_cmvneg", "Gongsharma_cmv_females_young", "Gongsharma_age_females_cmvneg"), ]
  
  p_exec_times$method[p_exec_times$method == "scPoli_hvg2000_dims5_lowres"] <- "scPoli_hvg2000_dims5"
  p_exec_times$method[p_exec_times$method == "PILOT_hvg2000_highres"] <- "PILOT_hvg2000"
  
  for (ds in unique(p_exec_times$dataset)) {
    p_exec_times$n_samples[p_exec_times$dataset == ds] <- r_exec_times$n_samples[r_exec_times$dataset == ds][1]
    p_exec_times$n_features[p_exec_times$dataset == ds] <- r_exec_times$n_features[r_exec_times$dataset == ds][1]
  }
  
  saveRDS(object = p_exec_times, p_exec_times_path)
} else {
  p_exec_times <- readRDS(p_exec_times_path)
}
```

## Combine and get actual cell numbers used per dataset

```{r}
exec_times_path <- file.path(getwd(), "data", "exec_times.rds")

if (!file.exists(exec_times_path)) {
  exec_times <- rbind(r_exec_times, p_exec_times)
  exec_times$n_cells <- 0
  
  dss <- names(datasets)
  dss <- dss[!dss %in% c("GongSharma_all_cmv", "GongSharma_all_sex")]
  
  exec_times <- exec_times[!exec_times$dataset %in% c("Gongsharma_sex_young_cmvneg", "Gongsharma_cmv_females_young", "Gongsharma_age_females_cmvneg"), ]
  
  for (ds in dss) {
    print(ds)
    seurat <- readRDS(file.path(path_data, paste0(datasets[[ds]][["ds_name"]], seurat_file_ending)))
    
    if (ds == "GongSharma_all_age") ds <- "GongSharma_all"
    
    exec_times$n_cells[exec_times$dataset == ds] <- nrow(seurat@meta.data)
  }
  
  saveRDS(object = exec_times, exec_times_path)
} else {
  exec_times <- readRDS(exec_times_path)
}
```


## Supp fig 13: Plot

```{r}
filter_methods <- c(
  "ECODA_authors_HR",

  # "Pseudobulk_hvg2000",
  "Pseudobulk_hvg2000",
  
  "MOFA_hvg2000_factors15",
  "scITD_hvg2000_factors5",
  "GloScope_hvg2000_pcadims30",
  "GloProp",
  "MrVI_hvg2000",
  "scPoli_hvg2000_dims15_highres",
  "PILOT_hvg2000"
)

library(scales)
library(ggrepel)

scientific_A_10n <- function(x) {
  s <- scales::scientific_format(digits = 2)(x) 
  s_converted <- gsub("e\\+", " %*% 10^", s) 
  return(parse(text = s_converted)) 
}

# --- 1. Clean Data ---
plot_data <- exec_times %>%
  filter(method %in% filter_methods) %>%
  # filter(!dataset %in% c("GongSharma_all_cmv", "GongSharma_all_sex")) %>%
  mutate(method = recode(method,
                         "ECODA_authors_HR" = "ECODA",
                         "Pseudobulk_hvg2000" = "Pseudobulk",
                         "MOFA_hvg2000_factors15" = "MOFA",
                         "scITD_hvg2000_factors5" = "scITD",
                         "GloScope_hvg2000_pcadims30" = "GloScope",
                         "MrVI_hvg2000" = "MrVI",
                         "scPoli_hvg2000_dims15_highres" = "scPoli",
                         "PILOT_hvg2000" = "PILOT"))

# --- 2. Calculate the End of the Regression Line ---
line_ends <- plot_data %>%
  group_by(method) %>%
  summarise(
    max_x = max(n_cells),
    model = list(lm(log10(time_secs) ~ n_cells)),
    pred_log_y = stats::predict(model[[1]], newdata = data.frame(n_cells = max_x))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    pred_y = 10^pred_log_y 
  )

# --- NEW STEP: Create Ranked Color Palette ---

# A. Sort methods by predicted time (Fastest/Lowest -> Slowest/Highest)
ranked_methods <- line_ends %>%
  arrange(pred_y) %>%
  pull(method)

# B. Create a gradient function (Green -> Black -> Red)
# I used "forestgreen" and "firebrick" as they are usually more readable than neon green/red
grad_func <- colorRampPalette(c("dodgerblue3", "grey50", "red"))

# C. Generate the exact number of colors needed
method_colors <- grad_func(length(ranked_methods))

# D. Assign the method names to the colors so ggplot maps them correctly
names(method_colors) <- ranked_methods


# --- 3. Plot ---
ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = n_cells, y = time_secs, color = method)) +
  annotation_logticks(sides = "l", color = "grey80") +
  # --- The Actual Data ---
  geom_point(shape = 4, size = 1, stroke = 1.25, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, size = 0.7) +
  
  # --- The Labels ---
  geom_text_repel(
    data = line_ends, 
    aes(x = max_x, y = pred_y, label = method), 
    size = 4,
    direction = "y",
    hjust = 0,
    nudge_x = max(plot_data$n_cells) * 0.05,
    segment.size = 0.2,
    segment.color = "grey50",
    show.legend = FALSE,
    bg.color = "white", # Optional: adds a white halo around text for readability
    bg.r = 0.15
  ) +
  
  # --- NEW: Apply the Custom Colors ---
  # scale_color_manual(values = method_colors) +
  
  # --- Theme & Scales ---
  labs(x = "Number of cells", y = "Time (s)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 3),
    labels = function(x) sapply(x, scientific_A_10n),
    limits = c(1e5, max(plot_data$n_cells) * 1.4)
  ) +
  scale_y_log10(
    breaks = trans_breaks("log10", function(x) 10^x),
    labels = trans_format("log10", math_format(10^.x))
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "Supp_fig_13_benchmark_exec_times.pdf"),
       width = 3.5,
       height = 3.5, limitsize = FALSE)
```

# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# Figure 2 A: Plot benchmark results

## Main plot (with funkyheatmap)

```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=12}
# --- 1. SETUP & CLEANING (Same as before) ---
filter_methods <- c(
  "ECODA_authors_HR",
  "ECODA_authors_HR_NULL",
  # "ECODA_HiTME_HR_layer2",
  # "ECODA_HiTME_HR_layer3",
  # "ECODA_seuratres_2",
  # "ECODA_PB_combo_normquantile_ecodaweight0.5",
  # paste0("ECODA_PB_combo_norm", norm_methods, "_ecodaweight0.5"),
  # "ECODA_authors_LR",
  # "Avg_PCA_embedding",
  # "Freq_highres",
  # "ECODA_deconv",
  # "Pseudobulk_10_PCA_dims",
  "Pseudobulk_hvg2000",
  # "Pseudobulk_hvg2000_bl",
  # "Pseudobulk_schvg2000",
  "MOFA_hvg2000_factors15",
  "scITD_hvg2000_factors5",
  "MrVI_hvg2000",
  "scPoli_hvg2000_dims15_highres",
  "PILOT_hvg2000",
  "GloScope_hvg2000_pcadims30_sqrtmat",
  "GloProp"
)

df_results_bmark <- df_results
df_results_bmark$temp <- paste0(df_results_bmark$dataset, df_results_bmark$method)
exec_times$temp <- paste0(exec_times$dataset, exec_times$method)

df_results_bmark <- merge(df_results_bmark,
                          exec_times[, c("temp", "time_secs")], 
                          by = "temp", 
                          all.x = TRUE)

df_results_bmark$temp <- NULL
exec_times$temp <- NULL


clean_data <- df_results_bmark %>%
  filter(method %in% filter_methods) %>%
  mutate(method = recode(method,
                         "ECODA_authors_HR" = "ECODA",
                         "ECODA_authors_HR_NULL" = "Shuffled_baseline",
                         # "ECODA_HiTME_HR_layer2" = "ECODA_automated",
                         # "ECODA_HiTME_HR_layer3" = "ECODA_automated_(HiTME_layer3)",
                         # "ECODA_seuratres_2" = "ECODA_unsupervised",
                         "ECODA_PB_combo_normquantile_ecodaweight0.5" = "ECODA+Pseudobulk",
                         # "Pseudobulk_10_PCA_dims" = "Pseudobulk_PCA",
                         "Pseudobulk_hvg2000" = "Pseudobulk",
                         # "Pseudobulk_schvg2000" = "Pseudobulk_schvg",
                         # "Freq_highres" = "ECODA_Freq%",
                         "MOFA_hvg2000_factors15" = "MOFA",
                         "scITD_hvg2000_factors5" = "scITD",
                         "MrVI_hvg2000" = "MrVI",
                         "scPoli_hvg2000_dims15_highres" = "scPoli",
                         "scITD_2_factors" = "scITD",
                         "PILOT_hvg2000" = "PILOT",
                         "GloScope_hvg2000_pcadims30_sqrtmat" = "GloScope")) %>%
  mutate(score = recode(score,
                        "anosim_score" = "ANOSIM",
                        "mod_knn3_score" = "Modularity",
                        "mod_score" = "Modularity",
                        "cluster_score" = "ARI")) %>%
  # mutate(dataset = recode(dataset,
  #                         "Adams" = "Adams (pulmonary fibrosis, disease type)",
  #                         "Bassez" = "Bassez (breast cancer, treatment response)",
  #                         "GongSharma_all_age" = "GongSharma (healthy, age group)",
  #                         "GongSharma_all_cmv" = "GongSharma (healthy, CMV-infection status)",
  #                         "GongSharma_all_sex" = "GongSharma (healthy, sex)",
  #                         "Kfoury" = "Kfoury (prostate metastasis, location)",
  #                         "Lee" = "Lee (primary glioblastoma, treatment status)",
  #                         "Pelka" = "Pelka (colon cancer, tumor or healthy)",
  #                         "Smillie" = "Smillie (ulcerative colitis, inflammation status)",
  #                         "Stephenson" = "Stephenson (COVID-19, infection status)",
  #                         "Wu" = "Wu (breast cancer, subtype)",
  #                         "Zhang" = "Zhang (breast cancer, tissue)"))
  mutate(dataset = recode(dataset,
                          "Adams" = "Adams (pulmonary fibrosis)",
                          "Bassez" = "Bassez (ICB treatment response)",
                          "GongSharma" = "GongSharma (healthy, CMV)",
                          "GongSharma_all_age" = "GongSharma (healthy, age)",
                          "GongSharma_all_cmv" = "GongSharma (healthy, CMV)",
                          "GongSharma_all_sex" = "GongSharma (healthy, sex)",
                          "Kfoury" = "Kfoury (prostate metastasis)",
                          "Kim" = "Kim (metastatic lung adenocarcinoma)",
                          "Lee" = "Lee (ICB treatment vs naive)",
                          "Pelka" = "Pelka (colon cancer vs control)",
                          "Smillie" = "Smillie (ulcerative colitis)",
                          "Stephenson" = "Stephenson (COVID-19)",
                          "Wu" = "Wu (breast cancer subtype)",
                          "Zhang" = "Zhang (tissue)"))

# --- 2. CALCULATE GEOMETRIC MEAN OF RANKS (NEW STEP) ---
df_ranks <- clean_data %>%
  # Group by specific test case
  group_by(dataset, score) %>%
  # Rank: Higher Value = Better Rank (1). Ties get the minimum rank.
  mutate(rank = rank(-value, ties.method = "min")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  # Now aggregate per method
  group_by(method) %>%
  # Calculate Geometric Mean: exp(mean(log(x)))
  summarise(geo_mean_rank = exp(mean(log(rank), na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  # Normalize so it plots nicely (0 to 1).
  # We INVERT it so Best Rank (lowest number) = 1.0 (biggest bar)
  mutate(Rank_Score = (max(geo_mean_rank) - geo_mean_rank) /
           (max(geo_mean_rank) - min(geo_mean_rank))) %>%
  select(method, Rank_Score)

# --- 3. SCALE DATA (0-1) FOR HEATMAP VISUALS ---
scaled_data <- clean_data %>%
  group_by(dataset, score) %>%
  mutate(value = min_max(value)) %>%
  ungroup()

# --- 4. AGGREGATE SCORES ---

# A. Overall Score (Arithmetic Mean of Scaled Values)
df_overall <- scaled_data %>%
  group_by(method) %>%
  summarise(Overall_Score = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE)) 

# B. Dataset Scores
df_datasets_wide <- scaled_data %>%
  group_by(method, dataset) %>%
  summarise(value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = method, names_from = dataset, values_from = value, names_prefix = "Dataset__")

# C. Metric Scores
df_metrics_wide <- scaled_data %>%
  group_by(method, score) %>%
  summarise(value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = method, names_from = score, values_from = value, names_prefix = "Metric__")

# D. Execution times
df_runtime <- clean_data %>%
  distinct(method, dataset, time_secs) %>% 
  group_by(method) %>%
  summarise(raw_time = mean(time_secs, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    log_time = log10(raw_time + 1),
    # Inverting so SHORTER time (faster) = BIGGER bar/BETTER score
    # Remove '1 -' if you want long bars to mean slow
    Runtime = min_max(log_time) 
  ) %>% 
  select(method, Runtime)

# --- 5. MERGE EVERYTHING ---
final_data <- df_overall %>%
  left_join(df_ranks, by = "method") %>% # <--- Join the new Rank Score
  left_join(df_datasets_wide, by = "method") %>%
  left_join(df_metrics_wide, by = "method") %>%
  left_join(df_runtime, by = "method") %>%
  arrange(desc(Overall_Score)) # Optional: sort by the new Rank Score instead

# --- 6. BUILD COLUMN INFO ---

# 1. Fixed Columns (Now ONLY method and Rank_Score)
info_method <- tribble(
  ~id,      ~group, ~name, ~geom,  ~palette, ~options,
  "method", "",     "",    "text", NA,       list(hjust = 0, width = 6)
)

# 2. Dataset Columns
dataset_cols <- colnames(final_data)[startsWith(colnames(final_data), "Dataset__")]
info_datasets <- tibble(id = dataset_cols) %>%
  mutate(
    group = "Datasets",
    name = str_remove(id, "Dataset__"), 
    geom = "circle",
    palette = "Datasets",
    options = list(list())
  ) %>% arrange(name)

# 3. Metric Columns (INCLUDING Score Avg at the start)
metric_cols <- colnames(final_data)[startsWith(colnames(final_data), "Metric__")]
target_metric_order <- c("ANOSIM", "Modularity", "ARI")

info_metrics_main <- tibble(id = metric_cols) %>%
  mutate(
    group = "Metrics",
    name = str_remove(id, "Metric__"),
    geom = "bar",
    palette = "Metrics",
    options = list(list(width = 2)),
    name_f = factor(name, levels = target_metric_order)
  ) %>% arrange(name_f) %>% select(-name_f)

# Define Score Avg as a Metric entry
info_score_avg <- tribble(
  ~id,             ~group,    ~name,  ~geom, ~palette,           ~options,
  "Overall_Score", "Overall", "Mean", "bar", "palette_avg_mean", list(width = 4)
)

# Combine metrics: Score Avg comes FIRST
info_metrics <- bind_rows(info_score_avg, info_metrics_main)

# 4. Runtime (The Rightmost column)
info_runtime <- tribble(
  ~id,       ~group,    ~name,     ~geom, ~palette,          ~options,
  "Runtime", "Runtime", "Runtime", "bar", "palette_runtime", list(width = 3)
)

# Combine everything in the final order
column_info <- bind_rows(info_method, info_score_avg, info_datasets, info_metrics_main, info_runtime)

ncolors <- 11

# --- 7. PLOT ---
funky_heatmap(
  final_data,
  column_info = column_info,
  scale_column = FALSE, 
  column_groups = tibble(
    group = c("Overall", "Datasets", "Metrics", "Runtime")
  ),
  palettes = list(
    palette_avg_mean = brewer.pal(n = ncolors, name = "RdBu"),
    Datasets = brewer.pal(n = ncolors, name = "RdBu"),
    Metrics = brewer.pal(n = ncolors, name = "RdBu"),
    palette_runtime = rev(brewer.pal(n = ncolors, name = "RdYlGn"))
  ),
  legends = list(
    list(
      palette = "palette_avg_mean",
      enabled = TRUE,
      title = "Overall Mean",
      labels = c(". 0", rep("", round((ncolors-2)/2)+1), "0.5", rep("", round((ncolors-2)/2)), "1")
    ),
    # list(
    #   palette = "palette_avg_rank",
    #   enabled = FALSE,
    #   title = "REMOVE PLACEHOLDER"
    # ),
    list(
      palette = "Datasets",
      enabled = TRUE,
      title = "Dataset separation",
      labels = c(".     Min", rep("", ncolors-2), "Max   .")
    ),
    list(
      palette = "Metrics",
      enabled = TRUE,
      title = "Metrics",
      labels = c(". 0", rep("", round((ncolors-2)/2)+1), "0.5", rep("", round((ncolors-2)/2)), "1")
    ),
    list(
      palette = "palette_runtime",
      enabled = TRUE,
      title = "Runtime log10(s)",
      labels = c("secs", "mins", "hours") 
    )
  ),
  position_args = position_arguments(
    col_width = 1.5,
    col_space = 0.2, col_annot_offset = 5
  )
)
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "Figure_2_A_benchmark_mainmethods.pdf"),
       width = 10,
       height = 6)
```


## Figure 2 B: MDS Bassez

```{r}
ds <- "Bassez"

methods <- list(
  "ECODA_authors_HR" = "ECODA",
  "GloProp" = "GloProp",
  "GloScope_hvg2000_pcadims30_sqrtmat" = "GloScope",
  "Pseudobulk_hvg2000" = "Pseudobulk",
  "Freq_highres" = "CellType_Frequency%",
  "MrVI_hvg2000" = "MrVI",
  "MOFA_hvg2000_factors15" = "MOFA",
  "scPoli_hvg2000_dims5" = "scPoli"
)

plot_list <- list()

for (m in names(methods)) {
  dist_mat <- result_list[["bmark"]][[ds]][[m]][["dist_mat"]]
  labels <- result_list[["bmark"]][[ds]][[m]][["labels"]]
  labels <- as.character(labels)
  labels[labels == "E"] <- "Responders"
  labels[labels == "NE"] <- "Non-responders"
  labels <- factor(labels, levels = c("Responders", "Non-responders"))
  
  plot_list[[m]] <- plot_mds(
    dist_mat,
    labels,
    cluster_score = FALSE,mod_score = FALSE, anosim_score = FALSE,
    coord_equal = TRUE, pointsize = 2,
    title = methods[[m]]
  )
}

wrap_plots(plot_list) +
  plot_layout(nrow = 2, guides = "collect")

ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "Figure_2_B_MDS_Bassez.pdf"),
       width = 10,
       height = 5)
```


## Main plot (rank-based)


```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=12}
# --- 1. SETUP & CLEANING (Same as before) ---
filter_methods <- c(
  "ECODA_authors_HR",
  "ECODA_authors_HR_NULL",
  # "ECODA_HiTME_HR_layer2",
  # "ECODA_HiTME_HR_layer3",
  # "ECODA_seuratres_2",
  # "ECODA_PB_combo_normquantile_ecodaweight0.5",
  # paste0("ECODA_PB_combo_norm", norm_methods, "_ecodaweight0.5"),
  # "ECODA_authors_LR",
  # "Avg_PCA_embedding",
  # "Freq_highres",
  # "ECODA_deconv",
  # "Pseudobulk_10_PCA_dims",
  "Pseudobulk_hvg2000",
  # "Pseudobulk_hvg2000_bl",
  # "Pseudobulk_schvg2000",
  "MOFA_hvg2000_factors15",
  "scITD_hvg2000_factors5",
  "MrVI_hvg2000",
  "scPoli_hvg2000_dims5",
  "PILOT_hvg2000",
  "GloScope_hvg2000_pcadims30_sqrtmat"
)

df_results_bmark <- df_results
df_results_bmark$temp <- paste0(df_results_bmark$dataset, df_results_bmark$method)
exec_times$temp <- paste0(exec_times$dataset, exec_times$method)

df_results_bmark <- merge(df_results_bmark,
                          exec_times[, c("temp", "time_secs")], 
                          by = "temp", 
                          all.x = TRUE)

df_results_bmark$temp <- NULL
exec_times$temp <- NULL


clean_data <- df_results_bmark %>%
  filter(method %in% filter_methods) %>%
  mutate(method = recode(method,
                         "ECODA_authors_HR" = "ECODA",
                         "ECODA_authors_HR_NULL" = "Shuffled_baseline",
                         # "ECODA_HiTME_HR_layer2" = "ECODA_automated",
                         # "ECODA_HiTME_HR_layer3" = "ECODA_automated_(HiTME_layer3)",
                         # "ECODA_seuratres_2" = "ECODA_unsupervised",
                         "ECODA_PB_combo_normquantile_ecodaweight0.5" = "ECODA+Pseudobulk",
                         # "Pseudobulk_10_PCA_dims" = "Pseudobulk_PCA",
                         "Pseudobulk_hvg2000" = "Pseudobulk",
                         # "Pseudobulk_schvg2000" = "Pseudobulk_schvg",
                         # "Freq_highres" = "ECODA_Freq%",
                         "MOFA_hvg2000_factors15" = "MOFA",
                         "scITD_hvg2000_factors5" = "scITD",
                         "MrVI_hvg2000" = "MrVI",
                         "scPoli_hvg2000_dims5" = "scPoli",
                         "scITD_2_factors" = "scITD",
                         "PILOT_hvg2000" = "PILOT",
                         "GloScope_hvg2000_pcadims30_sqrtmat" = "GloScope")) %>%
  mutate(score = recode(score,
                        "anosim_score" = "ANOSIM",
                        "mod_knn3_score" = "Modularity",
                        "mod_score" = "Modularity",
                        "cluster_score" = "ARI")) %>%
  mutate(dataset = recode(dataset,
                          "GongSharma_all_age" = "GongSharma_age",
                          "GongSharma_all_cmv" = "GongSharma_cmv",
                          "GongSharma_all_sex" = "GongSharma_sex"))

# --- 1. TRANSFORMATION TO RANKS ---
df_ranked <- clean_data %>%
  group_by(dataset, score) %>%
  mutate(rank = rank(-value, ties.method = "average")) %>%
  ungroup()

# --- 2. AGGREGATE RANK-BASED SCORES ---
df_overall <- df_ranked %>%
  group_by(method) %>%
  summarise(Overall_Rank = mean(rank, na.rm = TRUE))

df_datasets_wide <- df_ranked %>%
  group_by(method, dataset) %>%
  summarise(avg_rank = mean(rank, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = method, names_from = dataset, 
              values_from = avg_rank, names_prefix = "Dataset__")

target_metric_order <- c("ANOSIM", "Modularity", "ARI")

df_metrics_wide <- df_ranked %>%
  mutate(score = factor(score, levels = target_metric_order)) %>%
  group_by(method, score) %>%
  summarise(avg_rank = mean(rank, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(score) %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = method, names_from = score, 
              values_from = avg_rank, names_prefix = "Metric__")

# --- 3. MERGE, INVERT, AND SCALE (Fixes the Error) ---
final_data <- df_overall %>%
  left_join(df_datasets_wide, by = "method") %>%
  left_join(df_metrics_wide, by = "method") %>%
  # Add mandatory 'id' column for funkyheatmap
  mutate(id = method)

# Identify all rank-based columns
rank_cols <- c("Overall_Rank", colnames(final_data)[startsWith(colnames(final_data), "Dataset__")], 
               colnames(final_data)[startsWith(colnames(final_data), "Metric__")])

# Instead of using min(x) and max(x) which vary per column,
# we use the theoretical best (1) and worst (total methods).
num_methods <- length(unique(final_data$method))

scale_ranks_global <- function(x, n_meth) {
  if(all(is.na(x))) return(x)
  # BEST rank (1) should map to 1.0
  # WORST rank (n_meth) should map to 0.0
  # Formula: (Worst - Current) / (Worst - Best)
  (n_meth - x) / (n_meth - 1)
}

final_data <- final_data %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(rank_cols), ~scale_ranks_global(.x, num_methods))) %>%
  arrange(desc(Overall_Rank))

# --- 4. COLUMN INFO CONFIGURATION ---
info_method <- tribble(
  ~id,      ~group, ~name,    ~geom, ~palette, ~options,
  "id",     "",     "",       "text", NA,       list(hjust = 0, width = 6)
)

info_overall <- tribble(
  ~id,            ~group,   ~name,      ~geom, ~palette,        ~options,
  "Overall_Rank", "Overall", "Avg Rank", "bar",  "palette_ranks", list(width = 4)
)

dataset_cols <- colnames(final_data)[startsWith(colnames(final_data), "Dataset__")]
info_datasets <- tibble(id = dataset_cols) %>%
  mutate(
    group = "Avg Rank per Dataset",
    name = str_remove(id, "Dataset__"), 
    geom = "circle",
    palette = "palette_ranks",
    options = list(list())
  )

metric_cols <- colnames(final_data)[startsWith(colnames(final_data), "Metric__")]
info_metrics <- tibble(id = metric_cols) %>%
  mutate(
    group = "Avg Rank per Metric",
    name = str_remove(id, "Metric__"),
    name_f = factor(name, levels = target_metric_order),
    geom = "bar",
    palette = "palette_ranks",
    options = list(list(width = 2))
  ) %>% 
  arrange(name_f) %>% 
  select(-name_f)

column_info <- bind_rows(info_method, info_overall, info_datasets, info_metrics)

# --- 5. PLOT ---
funky_heatmap(
  data = final_data,
  column_info = column_info,
  scale_column = FALSE, # Values are already 0-1
  palettes = list(
    palette_ranks = brewer.pal(n = ncolors, name = "RdBu")
  ),
  column_groups = tibble(
    group = c("Overall", "Avg Rank per Dataset", "Avg Rank per Metric")
  ),
  legends = list(
    list(palette = "palette_ranks", title = "Rank", labels = c(".       Worst", rep("", round((ncolors-2)/2)+1), "", rep("", round((ncolors-2)/2)), "Best    ."))
  )
)
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "benchmark_summary_funkyheatmap_mainmethods_ranks.pdf"),
       width = 10,
       height = 5)
```



## Supp fig 14: Extended benchmark (with avg rank)

```{r fig.height=8, fig.width=14}
# --- 1. SETUP & CLEANING (Same as before) ---
filter_methods <- c(
  "ECODA_authors_HR",
  "ECODA_authors_HR_NULL",
  "ECODA_HiTME_HR_layer2",
  "ECODA_scATOMIC_HR",
  # "ECODA_HiTME_HR_layer3",
  "ECODA_seuratres_2",
  # "ECODA_PB_combo_normquantile_ecodaweight0.5",
  # paste0("ECODA_PB_combo_norm", norm_methods, "_ecodaweight0.5"),
  # "ECODA_authors_LR",
  "Avg_PCA_embedding",
  "Freq_highres",
  # "ECODA_deconv",
  # "Pseudobulk_10_PCA_dims",
  "Pseudobulk_hvg2000",
  "Pseudobulk_ct_LR_hvg2000",
  "Pseudobulk_ct_HR_hvg2000",
  "MOFA_hvg2000_factors15",
  "scITD_hvg2000_factors5",
  "MrVI_hvg2000",
  "scPoli_hvg2000_dims15_highres",
  "PILOT_hvg2000",
  "GloScope_hvg2000_pcadims30_sqrtmat",
  "GloProp"
)

df_results_bmark <- df_results
df_results_bmark$temp <- paste0(df_results_bmark$dataset, df_results_bmark$method)
exec_times$temp <- paste0(exec_times$dataset, exec_times$method)

df_results_bmark <- merge(df_results_bmark,
                          exec_times[, c("temp", "time_secs")], 
                          by = "temp",
                          all.x = TRUE)

df_results_bmark$temp <- NULL
exec_times$temp <- NULL


clean_data <- df_results_bmark %>%
  filter(method %in% filter_methods) %>%
  mutate(method = recode(method,
                         "ECODA_authors_HR" = "ECODA_authors",
                         "ECODA_authors_HR_NULL" = "Shuffled_baseline",
                         "ECODA_HiTME_HR_layer2" = "ECODA_automated_HiTME",
                         "ECODA_HiTME_HR_layer3" = "ECODA_automated_(HiTME_layer3)",
                         "ECODA_scATOMIC_HR" = "ECODA_automated_scATOMIC",
                         "ECODA_seuratres_2" = "ECODA_Leiden_res_2",
                         # "ECODA_PB_combo_normquantile_ecodaweight0.5" = "ECODA+Pseudobulk",
                         "Pseudobulk_10_PCA_dims" = "Pseudobulk_PCA",
                         "Pseudobulk_hvg2000" = "Pseudobulk",
                         "Pseudobulk_ct_LR_hvg2000" = "Pseudobulk_CT_LR",
                         "Pseudobulk_ct_HR_hvg2000" = "Pseudobulk_CT_HR",
                         "Freq_highres" = "CellType_Frequency%",
                         "MOFA_hvg2000_factors15" = "MOFA",
                         "scITD_hvg2000_factors5" = "scITD",
                         "MrVI_hvg2000" = "MrVI",
                         "scPoli_hvg2000_dims15_highres" = "scPoli",
                         "scITD_2_factors" = "scITD",
                         "PILOT_hvg2000" = "PILOT",
                         "GloScope_hvg2000_pcadims30_sqrtmat" = "GloScope")) %>%
  mutate(score = recode(score,
                        "anosim_score" = "ANOSIM",
                        "mod_knn3_score" = "Modularity",
                        "mod_score" = "Modularity",
                        "cluster_score" = "ARI")) %>%
  mutate(dataset = recode(dataset,
                          "Adams" = "Adams (pulmonary fibrosis)",
                          "Bassez" = "Bassez (ICB treatment response)",
                          "GongSharma" = "GongSharma (healthy, cmv)",
                          "GongSharma_all_age" = "GongSharma (healthy, age)",
                          "GongSharma_all_cmv" = "GongSharma (healthy, CMV)",
                          "GongSharma_all_sex" = "GongSharma (healthy, sex)",
                          "Kfoury" = "Kfoury (prostate metastasis)",
                          "Kim" = "Kim (metastatic lung adenocarcinoma)",
                          "Lee" = "Lee (ICB treatment vs naive)",
                          "Pelka" = "Pelka (colon cancer vs control)",
                          "Smillie" = "Smillie (ulcerative colitis)",
                          "Stephenson" = "Stephenson (COVID-19)",
                          "Wu" = "Wu (breast cancer subtype)",
                          "Zhang" = "Zhang (tissue)"))

# --- 2. CALCULATE GEOMETRIC MEAN OF RANKS (NEW STEP) ---
df_ranks <- clean_data %>%
  # Group by specific test case
  group_by(dataset, score) %>% 
  # Rank: Higher Value = Better Rank (1). Ties get the minimum rank.
  mutate(rank = rank(-value, ties.method = "min")) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  # Now aggregate per method
  group_by(method) %>% 
  # # Calculate Geometric Mean: exp(mean(log(x)))
  # summarise(geo_mean_rank = exp(mean(log(rank), na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  summarise(mean_rank = mean(rank, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  # Normalize so it plots nicely (0 to 1). 
  # We INVERT it so Best Rank (lowest number) = 1.0 (biggest bar)
  mutate(Rank_Score = (max(mean_rank) - mean_rank) / 
           (max(mean_rank) - min(mean_rank))) %>%
  select(method, Rank_Score)

# --- 3. SCALE DATA (0-1) FOR HEATMAP VISUALS ---
scaled_data <- clean_data %>%
  group_by(dataset, score) %>%
  mutate(value = min_max(value)) %>%
  ungroup()

# --- 4. AGGREGATE SCORES ---

# A. Overall Score (Arithmetic Mean of Scaled Values)
df_overall <- scaled_data %>%
  group_by(method) %>%
  summarise(Overall_Score = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE)) 

# B. Dataset Scores
df_datasets_wide <- scaled_data %>%
  group_by(method, dataset) %>%
  summarise(value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = method, names_from = dataset, values_from = value, names_prefix = "Dataset__")

# C. Metric Scores
df_metrics_wide <- scaled_data %>%
  group_by(method, score) %>%
  summarise(value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = method, names_from = score, values_from = value, names_prefix = "Metric__")

# D. Execution times
df_runtime <- clean_data %>%
  distinct(method, dataset, time_secs) %>% 
  group_by(method) %>%
  summarise(raw_time = mean(time_secs, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    log_time = log10(raw_time + 1),
    # Inverting so SHORTER time (faster) = BIGGER bar/BETTER score
    # Remove '1 -' if you want long bars to mean slow
    Runtime = min_max(log_time) 
  ) %>% 
  select(method, Runtime)

# --- 5. MERGE EVERYTHING ---
final_data <- df_overall %>%
  left_join(df_ranks, by = "method") %>% # <--- Join the new Rank Score
  left_join(df_datasets_wide, by = "method") %>%
  left_join(df_metrics_wide, by = "method") %>%
  left_join(df_runtime, by = "method") %>%
  arrange(desc(Overall_Score))
  # arrange(desc(Rank_Score)) # Optional: sort by the new Rank Score instead

# --- 6. BUILD COLUMN INFO ---

# 1. Method Column (The Label)
info_method <- tribble(
  ~id,      ~group, ~name, ~geom,  ~palette, ~options,
  "method", "",     "",    "text", NA,       list(hjust = 0, width = 8)
)

# 2.1 Score Avg
info_score_avg <- tribble(
  ~id,             ~group,    ~name,  ~geom, ~palette,           ~options,
  "Overall_Score", "Overall", "Metrics Mean", "bar", "palette_avg_mean", list(width = 4)
)

# 2.2 Rank Avg
info_rank_avg <- tribble(
  ~id,             ~group,    ~name,           ~geom,  ~palette,          ~options,
  "Rank_Score",    "Overall", "Rank Mean",  "bar",  "palette_avg_rank", list(width = 4, legend = FALSE)
)

# 3. Dataset Columns
dataset_cols <- colnames(final_data)[startsWith(colnames(final_data), "Dataset__")]
info_datasets <- tibble(id = dataset_cols) %>%
  mutate(
    group = "Datasets",
    name = str_remove(id, "Dataset__"), 
    geom = "circle",
    palette = "Datasets",
    options = list(list())
  ) %>% arrange(name)

# 4. Metric Columns (Individual metrics)
metric_cols <- colnames(final_data)[startsWith(colnames(final_data), "Metric__")]
target_metric_order <- c("ANOSIM", "Modularity", "ARI")

info_metrics_main <- tibble(id = metric_cols) %>%
  mutate(
    group = "Metrics",
    name = str_remove(id, "Metric__"),
    geom = "bar",
    palette = "Metrics",
    options = list(list(width = 2)),
    name_f = factor(name, levels = target_metric_order)
  ) %>% arrange(name_f) %>% select(-name_f)

# 5. Runtime (The Rightmost column)
info_runtime <- tribble(
  ~id,       ~group,    ~name,     ~geom, ~palette,          ~options,
  "Runtime", "Runtime", "Runtime", "bar", "palette_runtime", list(width = 3)
)

# --- KEY CHANGE: Re-order the bind_rows to define horizontal placement ---
# This order determines the columns from left to right.
column_info <- bind_rows(
  info_method,      # 1st: Method Name
  info_score_avg,   # 2.1: Mean Metric Score
  info_rank_avg,    # 2.2: Mean rank
  info_datasets,    # 3rd: Dataset Circles
  info_metrics_main,# 4th: Individual Metric Bars
  info_runtime      # 5th: Runtime Bar
)

# 
# # 2. Dataset Columns
# dataset_cols <- colnames(final_data)[startsWith(colnames(final_data), "Dataset__")]
# info_datasets <- tibble(id = dataset_cols) %>%
#   mutate(
#     group = "Datasets",
#     name = str_remove(id, "Dataset__"), 
#     geom = "circle",
#     palette = "Datasets",
#     options = list(list())
#   ) %>% arrange(name)
# 
# # 3. Metric Columns (INCLUDING Score Avg at the start)
# metric_cols <- colnames(final_data)[startsWith(colnames(final_data), "Metric__")]
# target_metric_order <- c("ANOSIM", "Modularity", "ARI")
# 
# # Create the specific Metric entries
# info_metrics_main <- tibble(id = metric_cols) %>%
#   mutate(
#     group = "Metrics",
#     name = str_remove(id, "Metric__"),
#     geom = "bar",
#     palette = "Metrics",
#     options = list(list(width = 2)),
#     name_f = factor(name, levels = target_metric_order)
#   ) %>% arrange(name_f) %>% select(-name_f)
# 
# # Define Score Avg as a Metric entry
# info_score_avg <- tribble(
#   ~id,             ~group,    ~name,       ~geom, ~palette,           ~options,
#   "Overall_Score", "Metrics", "Mean", "bar", "palette_avg_mean", list(width = 4, legend = FALSE)
# )
# 
# # Combine metrics: Score Avg comes FIRST
# info_metrics <- bind_rows(info_score_avg, info_metrics_main)
# 
# # 4. Runtime (The Rightmost column)
# info_runtime <- tribble(
#   ~id,       ~group,    ~name,     ~geom, ~palette,          ~options,
#   "Runtime", "Runtime", "Runtime", "bar", "palette_runtime", list(width = 3)
# )
# 
# # Combine everything in the final order
# column_info <- bind_rows(info_left, info_datasets, info_metrics, info_runtime)

ncolors <- 11

# --- 7. PLOT ---
funky_heatmap(
  final_data,
  column_info = column_info,
  scale_column = FALSE, 
  column_groups = tibble(
    group = c("Overall", "Datasets", "Metrics", "Runtime")
  ),
  palettes = list(
    palette_avg_rank = brewer.pal(n = ncolors, name = "RdBu"),
    palette_avg_mean = brewer.pal(n = ncolors, name = "RdBu"),
    Datasets = brewer.pal(n = ncolors, name = "RdBu"),
    Metrics = brewer.pal(n = ncolors, name = "RdBu"),
    palette_runtime = rev(brewer.pal(n = ncolors, name = "RdYlGn"))
  ),
  legends = list(
    list(
      palette = "palette_avg_rank",
      enabled = FALSE,
      title = "REMOVE PLACEHOLDER"
    ),
    list(
      palette = "palette_avg_mean",
      enabled = TRUE,
      title = "Overall",
      labels = c(".         Worst", rep("", ncolors-2), "Best       .")
    ),
    list(
      palette = "Datasets",
      enabled = TRUE,
      title = "Dataset separation",
      labels = c(".     Min", rep("", ncolors-2), "Max   .")
    ),
    list(
      palette = "Metrics",
      enabled = TRUE,
      labels = c(". 0", rep("", round((ncolors-2)/2)+1), "0.5", rep("", round((ncolors-2)/2)), "1")
    ),
    list(
      palette = "palette_runtime",
      enabled = TRUE,
      title = "Runtime log10(s)",
      labels = c("secs", "mins", "hours") 
    )
  ),
  position_args = position_arguments(
    col_width = 1.5,
    col_space = 0.2, col_annot_offset = 5
  )
)
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "Supp_fig_14_benchmark_extended.pdf"),
       width = 14,
       height = 8)
```


# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# ---------------------------------------------------------------


# Supp fig 1: Correlation between metrics

```{r}
# --- 1. PREPARE WIDE DATA ---
# Pivot so each metric is a column, and calculate the mean
df_wide <- clean_data %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = c(dataset, method), 
              names_from = score, 
              values_from = value) %>%
  mutate(Mean_Score = (ANOSIM + Modularity + ARI) / 3)

# --- 2. DEFINE A REUSABLE PLOTTING FUNCTION ---
# This ensures all your plots have the same look and regression stats
plot_corr <- function(data, x_var, y_var, x_label, y_label, color_hex) {
  lims <- c(min(data[, 3:6])-0.05, 1.2)
  ggplot(data, aes_string(x = x_var, y = y_var)) +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, 
                linetype = "dashed", 
                color = "grey50", 
                linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = color_hex, size = 1.5) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", linewidth = 1, se = FALSE) +
    stat_cor(aes(label = ..rr.label..), label.x.npc = "left", label.y.npc = "top", label.y = max(data[, y_var]) * 1.025) +
    labs(x = x_label, y = y_label) +
    xlim(lims) + ylim(lims) +
    theme_classic()
}

# --- 3. CREATE THE INDIVIDUAL PLOTS ---

# A. Metrics vs Mean (from your previous request)
p1 <- plot_corr(df_wide, "Mean_Score", "ANOSIM", "Mean Score", "ANOSIM", "#000000")
p2 <- plot_corr(df_wide, "Mean_Score", "Modularity", "Mean Score", "Modularity", "#000000")
p3 <- plot_corr(df_wide, "Mean_Score", "ARI", "Mean Score", "ARI", "#000000")

# B. Pairwise Correlations (New request)
p4 <- plot_corr(df_wide, "Modularity", "ANOSIM", "Modularity", "ANOSIM", "#000000")
p5 <- plot_corr(df_wide, "ARI", "Modularity", "ARI", "Modularity", "#000000")
p6 <- plot_corr(df_wide, "ANOSIM", "ARI", "ANOSIM", "ARI", "#000000")

# --- 4. COMBINE AND DISPLAY ---
# Using patchwork to create a clean layout
(p4 | p5 | p6) / (p1 | p2 | p3) + 
  plot_annotation(
    # title = "Metric Consistency Analysis",
    # subtitle = "Top: Individual metrics vs. Grand Mean | Bottom: Pairwise metric correlations",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16))
  )
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "Supp_fig_1_metrics_correlation.pdf"),
       width = 7.5,
       height = 5)
```

# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# Supp fig 15 A: Plot normalization results

## Plot results

```{r}
df_results <- Reduce(rbind, result_list[["trans"]]) %>%
  mutate(trans_method = recode(trans_method,
                         "clr" = "CLR",
                         "alr_mincvref" = "ALR_minCVref",
                         "alr_randref" = "ALR_randref",
                         "arcsine_sqrt" = "Arcsine_sqrt",
                         "counts" = "Counts",
                         "freq" = "Frequency%"))

df_results <- df_results %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ANOSIM_score, Modularity_score, Adjusted_Rand_Index),
    names_to = "score",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  as.data.frame()


df_results_anosim <- df_results %>%
  filter(score == "ANOSIM_score") %>%
  group_by(trans_method) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(value), sem = sd(value) / sqrt(length(value)))

df_results_anosim <- df_results_anosim %>%
  arrange(desc(mean))

df_results_anosim$trans_method <- factor(df_results_anosim$trans_method, levels = df_results_anosim$trans_method)
df_results$trans_method <- factor(df_results$trans_method, levels = df_results_anosim$trans_method)

score.labs <- c("ANOSIM score", "Adjusted rand index", "Modularity score")
names(score.labs) <- sort(unique(df_results$score))


df_results_list[["Normalization"]] <- df_results


p1 <- df_results %>%
  filter(score == "ANOSIM_score") %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x = trans_method, y = value)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_se", geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", fill = "white", color = "black") +
  geom_point(position = "identity", alpha = 0.6, size = 0.8) +
  geom_line(aes(group = dataset), color = "grey20", alpha = 0.2) +
  
  stat_compare_means(
    ref.group = "CLR",
    method = "wilcox.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    # angle = 25,
    # aes(label = sprintf("%5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..))),
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif)),
    size = 3,
    label.y = 0.95
  ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation score (ANOSIM)") +
  theme_classic2() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 65, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  ylim(c(-0.1, 1))
print(p1)
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "Supp_fig_15A_transformations_anosim.pdf"),
       width = 2.5,
       height = 3.5)



df_results %>%
  group_by(score, trans_method) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(value), sem = sd(value) / sqrt(length(value))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x = trans_method, y = mean)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean-sem, ymax=mean+sem), width=0.2, colour="black", alpha=0.9) +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 75, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  facet_grid(scales = "free",
             rows = vars(score),
             labeller = labeller(score = score.labs))
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "transformations_real_datasets_summary_barplot_separatescores_bars.pdf"),
       width = 7,
       height = 7)



my_comparisons <- list(
  c("CLR", "Frequency(%)"),
  c("CLR", "Counts")
  )

df_results %>%
  filter(score == "ANOSIM_score") %>%
  filter(trans_method %in% c("Counts", "Frequency(%)", "CLR")) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_reorder(trans_method, value, .desc = FALSE, .fun = mean), y = value, fill = ifelse(trans_method == "CLR", "lightgreen", "gray70"))) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_se", geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar") +
  geom_point(position = "identity", alpha = 0.6, size = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(group = dataset), color = "grey20", alpha = 0.1) +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = my_comparisons,
    method = "wilcox.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    size = 3,
    tip.length = 0,
    # label.y = 0.95,
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))
  ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation of biological groups\n(ANOSIM score)") +
  theme_classic2(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  ylim(c(-0.05, 1)) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
    "Counts",
    "Frequency(%)",
    expression(bold("CLR")) # Make label bold
  ))
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "POSTER_transformations_real_datasets_summary_barplot_anosim_refCLR.pdf"),
       width = 2,
       height = 3.5)





# New facet label names for dose variable
score.labs <- c("Adjusted rand index", "ANOSIM score", "Modularity score")
names(score.labs) <- sort(unique(df_results$score))

# New facet label names for supp variable
datas.labs <- sort(unique(df_results$dataset))
datas.labs[datas.labs == "GongSharma_cmv_females"] <- "Gong & Sharma\nSubset: females\nSeparation by: CMV infection"
datas.labs[datas.labs == "GongSharma_age_females_cmvneg"] <- "Gong & Sharma\nSubset: CMV negative females\nSeparation by: age"
names(datas.labs) <- sort(unique(df_results$dataset))



ggplot(df_results, aes(x = trans_method, y = value)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Separation score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1),
        legend.position = "none") +
  facet_grid(score ~ dataset,
             scales = "free",
             labeller = labeller(score = score.labs, dataset = datas.labs))
# facet_grid(scales = "free",
#            rows = vars(score_method), cols = vars(dataset))
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "transformations_real_datasets_detailed_barplot.pdf"),
       width = 8,
       height = 7)



# df_results %>%
#   group_by(score_method, method) %>%
#   summarize(mean = mean(values), sem = sd(values) / sqrt(length(values))) %>%
#   ungroup() %>%
#   
#   ggplot(aes(x = method, y = mean)) + 
#   geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
#   # stat_summary(fun.y = mean, geom = "bar") +
#   geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean-sem, ymax=mean+sem), width=0.2, colour="black", alpha=0.9) +
#   # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
#   labs(x = "", y = "Separation score") +
#   theme_minimal() +
#   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
#   facet_grid(scales = "free",
#              rows = vars(score_method),
#              labeller = labeller(score_method = score.labs))


ggplot(df_results, aes(x = trans_method, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=dataset)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group=dataset, linetype=dataset), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  facet_grid(scales = "free",
             rows = vars(score),
             labeller = labeller(score = score.labs))

ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "transformations_real_datasets_summary_barplot_separatescores.pdf"),
       width = 5,
       height = 5)



# df_results_anosim %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x = method, y = mean)) + 
#   geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
#   # stat_summary(fun.y = mean, geom = "bar") +
#   geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean-sem, ymax=mean+sem), width=0.2, colour="black", alpha=0.9) +
#   # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
#   labs(x = "", y = "Adjusted Rand Index") +
#   theme_minimal() +
#   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
#   NoLegend()


df_results_anosim <- df_results %>%
  filter(score == "ANOSIM_score")

df_results_anosim <- df_results_anosim[!grepl("pca", df_results_anosim$trans_method), ]

my_comparisons <- purrr::map(unique(as.character(df_results_anosim$trans_method)), ~ c(.x, "Frequency(%)"))
my_comparisons <- Filter(function(x) length(unique(x)) == 2, my_comparisons)
# my_comparisons <- c(my_comparisons, list(c("clr", "arcsine_sqrt")))
my_comparisons <- my_comparisons[c(4, 3, 2, 1, 5)]


ggplot(df_results_anosim, aes(x = trans_method, y = value)) +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = my_comparisons,
    # p.adjust.method = "bonferroni",
    # ref.group = "freq",
    method = "wilcox.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    # aes(label = sprintf("p = %5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..)))
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))
  ) + # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=dataset)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(unique((df_results_anosim$dataset)))) +
  geom_line(aes(group=dataset, linetype=dataset), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(x = "", y = "ANOSIM score") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1))

ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "transformations_real_datasets_summary_barplot.pdf"),
       width = 6,
       height = 4.5)


ggplot(df_results_anosim, aes(x = trans_method, y = value)) +
  stat_compare_means(
    # comparisons = my_comparisons,
    # p.adjust.method = "bonferroni",
    ref.group = "CLR",
    method = "wilcox.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    # aes(label = sprintf("p = %5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..)))
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))
  ) + # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=dataset)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(unique((df_results_anosim$dataset)))) +
  geom_line(aes(group=dataset, linetype=dataset), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(x = "", y = "ANOSIM score") +
  # stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.adj", 
  #                    y.position = c(max(df_results_anosim$values)+0.1, max(df_results_anosim$values)+0.2), hide.ns = TRUE) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1))
```

# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# Supp fig 15 B: Plot zero imputation results

## Plot results

```{r}
zeroimp_result_list <- result_list[["zeroimp"]]

df_results <- imap_dfr(zeroimp_result_list, ~ {
  dataset_name <- .y
  imap_dfr(.x, ~ {
    method_name <- .y
    imap_dfr(.x, ~ {
      tibble(
        dataset = dataset_name,
        method = method_name,
        score = .y,
        value = .x
      )
    })
  })
})

df_results <- df_results[!grepl("impRZilr", df_results$method), ]
df_results <- df_results[!df_results$score == "mod_score", ]

df_results_list[["Zero_imputation"]] <- df_results

df_results_anosim <- df_results %>%
  filter(score == "anosim_score") %>%
  group_by(method) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(value), sem = sd(value) / sqrt(length(value)))

df_results_anosim <- df_results_anosim %>%
  arrange(desc(mean))

df_results_anosim$method <- factor(df_results_anosim$method, levels = df_results_anosim$method)
df_results$method <- factor(df_results$method, levels = df_results_anosim$method)



p2 <- df_results %>%
  filter(score == "anosim_score") %>%
  filter(method != "asinsqrt") %>%
  filter(!grepl("perc", method)) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = value)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_se", geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", fill = "white", color = "black") +
  geom_point(position = "identity", alpha = 0.6, size = 0.8) +
  geom_line(aes(group = dataset), color = "grey20", alpha = 0.2) +
  stat_compare_means(
    ref.group = "counts_all_0.5",
    method = "wilcox.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    # angle = 25,
    label.y = 0.95,
    size = 3,
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))
    # aes(label = sprintf("%5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..)))
  ) +
  ylim(c(-0.1, 1)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation score (ANOSIM)") +
  theme_classic2() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 65, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))
print(p2)
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "Supp_fig_15B_zero_replacement_anosim.pdf"),
       width = 2.5,
       height = 4)



df_results %>%
  filter(score == "mod_knn3_score") %>%
  filter(method != "asinsqrt") %>%
  filter(!grepl("perc", method)) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = value)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_se", geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", fill = "white", color = "black") +
  geom_point(position = "identity", alpha = 0.6, size = 0.8) +
  geom_line(aes(group = dataset), color = "grey20", alpha = 0.2) +
  stat_compare_means(
    ref.group = "counts_all_0.5",
    method = "wilcox.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    # angle = 25,
    label.y = 0.9,
    size = 3,
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))
    # aes(label = sprintf("%5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..)))
  ) +
  ylim(c(-0.1, 0.9)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation score (Modularity)") +
  theme_classic2() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 65, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))



df_results %>%
  filter(score == "cluster_score") %>%
  filter(method != "asinsqrt") %>%
  filter(!grepl("perc", method)) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = value)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_se", geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", fill = "white", color = "black") +
  geom_point(position = "identity", alpha = 0.6, size = 0.8) +
  geom_line(aes(group = dataset), color = "grey20", alpha = 0.2) +
  stat_compare_means(
    ref.group = "counts_all_0.5",
    method = "wilcox.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    # angle = 25,
    label.y = 0.9,
    size = 3,
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))
    # aes(label = sprintf("%5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..)))
  ) +
  ylim(c(-0.1, 0.9)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation score (ARI)") +
  theme_classic2() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 65, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))




# New facet label names for dose variable
score.labs <- c("ANOSIM score", "Adjusted rand index", "Modularity score")
names(score.labs) <- sort(unique(df_results$score))

# New facet label names for supp variable
datas.labs <- sort(unique(df_results$dataset))
datas.labs[datas.labs == "GongSharma_cmv_females"] <- "Gong & Sharma\nSubset: females\nSeparation by: CMV infection"
datas.labs[datas.labs == "GongSharma_age_females_cmvneg"] <- "Gong & Sharma\nSubset: CMV negative females\nSeparation by: age"
names(datas.labs) <- sort(unique(df_results$dataset))



df_results %>%
  filter(method != "asinsqrt") %>%
  filter(!grepl("perc", method)) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = value)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = "mean_se", geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", fill = "white", color = "black") +
  geom_point(position = "identity", alpha = 0.6, size = 0.8) +
  geom_line(aes(group = dataset), color = "grey20", alpha = 0.2) +
  stat_compare_means(
    ref.group = "counts_all_0.5",
    method = "wilcox.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    # angle = 25,
    label.y = 1.1,
    size = 3,
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))
    # aes(label = sprintf("%5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..)))
  ) +
  ylim(c(-0.2, 1.2)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation score") +
  theme_classic2() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 65, vjust = 1, hjust = 1)) +
  facet_grid(scales = "free",
             rows = vars(score),
             labeller = labeller(score = score.labs))

ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_real_datasets_summary_separatescores.pdf"),
       width = 3,
       height = 8)




ggplot(df_results, aes(x = method, y = value)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
  labs(x = "Imputation method",
       y = "Separation") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1),
        legend.position = "none") +
  facet_grid(score ~ dataset,
             scales = "free",
             labeller = labeller(score = score.labs, dataset = datas.labs))
  # facet_grid(scales = "free",
  #            rows = vars(score), cols = vars(dataset))
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_real_datasets_detailed_barplot.pdf"),
       width = 10,
       height = 6)




df_results %>%
  group_by(score, method) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(value), sem = sd(value) / sqrt(length(value))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%

  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = mean)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
  # stat_summary(fun.y = mean, geom = "bar") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean-sem, ymax=mean+sem), width=0.2, colour="black", alpha=0.9) +
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 65, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  facet_grid(scales = "free",
             rows = vars(score),
             labeller = labeller(score = score.labs))

ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_real_datasets_summary_barplot_separatescores.pdf"),
       width = 3.5,
       height = 6)

ggplot(df_results, aes(x = method, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=dataset)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group=dataset, linetype=dataset), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Separation score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  facet_grid(scales = "free",
             rows = vars(score),
             labeller = labeller(score = score.labs))

ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_real_datasets_summary_boxplot_separatescores.pdf"),
       width = 7,
       height = 6)



df_results %>%
  filter(score == "cluster_score") %>%
  group_by(method) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(value), sem = sd(value) / sqrt(length(value))) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = mean)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
  # stat_summary(fun.y = mean, geom = "bar") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean-sem, ymax=mean+sem), width=0.2, colour="black", alpha=0.9) +
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Adjusted Rand Index") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  NoLegend()


df_results %>%
  filter(score == "anosim_score") %>%
  group_by(method) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(value), sem = sd(value) / sqrt(length(value))) %>%
  
  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = mean)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
  # stat_summary(fun.y = mean, geom = "bar") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean-sem, ymax=mean+sem), width=0.2, colour="black", alpha=0.9) +
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "ANOSIM score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) +
  NoLegend()


df_results_clustering <- df_results %>%
  filter(score == "cluster_score")

my_comparisons <- purrr::map(unique(as.character(df_results_clustering$method)), ~ c(.x, "counts_all_1"))
my_comparisons <- Filter(function(x) length(unique(x)) == 2, my_comparisons)
my_comparisons <- my_comparisons[c(6,1,7:10, 2:5)]
# my_comparisons[[length(my_comparisons) + 1]] <- c("perc_all_0.1%", "perc_all_1%")

p <- ggplot(df_results_clustering, aes(x = method, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=dataset)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group=dataset, linetype=dataset), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = my_comparisons,
    method = "t.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    # aes(label = sprintf("p = %5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..)))
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))
  ) + # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Adjusted Rand Index") +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(unique((df_results_clustering$dataset)))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1))
print(p)
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_real_datasets_summary_boxplot_clusterscore.pdf"),
       width = 8,
       height = 6)

df_results_modularity <- df_results %>%
  filter(score == "mod_score")

p <- ggplot(df_results_modularity, aes(x = method, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  # geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=dataset)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group=dataset, linetype=dataset), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = my_comparisons,
    method = "t.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    # aes(label = sprintf("p = %5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..)))
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))
  ) + # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Modularity score") +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(unique((df_results_modularity$dataset)))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1))
print(p)
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_real_datasets_summary_boxplot_modscore.pdf"),
       width = 8,
       height = 6)


df_results_anosim <- df_results %>%
  filter(score == "anosim_score")

p <- ggplot(df_results_anosim, aes(x = method, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  # geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge()) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=dataset)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group=dataset, linetype=dataset), alpha = 1, color = "steelblue") +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = my_comparisons,
    method = "t.test",
    paired = TRUE,
    # aes(label = sprintf("p = %5.2f", as.numeric(..p.format..)))
    aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))
  ) + # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
  # geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  labs(x = "", y = "ANOSIM score") +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(unique((df_results_anosim$dataset)))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1))
print(p)
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_real_datasets_summary_boxplot_anosimscore.pdf"),
       width = 8,
       height = 6)

```

# Supp fig 15AB plot

```{r}
wrap_plots(list(p1, p2)) +
  plot_layout(nrow = 1) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold"))
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "Supp_fig_15AB_trans_zero_anosim.pdf"),
       width = 6,
       height = 4.5)
```


# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# Batch effect

## Joanito dataset

## Load/preprocess

```{r}
seurat <- readRDS(file.path(path_data, "JoaI_2022_35773407_Nofilt_whole_ECODAprocessed.rds"))

seurat@meta.data$cell.type_new <- seurat@meta.data$cell.type
iCMS <- !is.na(seurat@meta.data$iCMS)
seurat@meta.data$cell.type_new[iCMS] <- paste0(seurat@meta.data$cell.type[iCMS], "_", ifelse(seurat@meta.data$iCMS[iCMS] == "Normal", "Normal", "Cancer"))

meta <- seurat@meta.data %>%
  group_by(sample.ID) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  as.data.frame()
row.names(meta) <- meta$sample.ID
meta$sample.origin <- gsub("-2", "", meta$sample.origin)
meta$seqtec <- ifelse(meta$dataset %in% c("CRC-SG1", "KUL5"), "5' seq", "3' seq")

bio_col <- "sample.origin"
batch_col <- "seqtec"

plot_list <- list()
```


## Plot PCA

### ECODA

```{r}
dist_mat <- as.data.frame.matrix(table(seurat@meta.data$sample.ID, seurat@meta.data$cell.type_new)) %>%
  impute_zeros(clr_zero_impute_method = "counts_all", clr_zero_impute_num = 0.5) %>%
  clr() %>%
  dist()

plot_list[["p_ecoda_bio"]] <- plot_mds(dist_mat, labels = meta[[bio_col]],
         cluster_score = F, mod_score = F, anosim_score = T,
         title = "ECODA - Biological groups"
)
print(plot_list[["p_ecoda_bio"]])


plot_list[["p_ecoda_batch"]] <- plot_mds(dist_mat, labels = meta[[batch_col]],
         cluster_score = F, mod_score = F, anosim_score = T,
         title = "ECODA - Batch groups"
)
print(plot_list[["p_ecoda_batch"]])
```


### PB


#### Without blacklist

```{r}
pb_norm <- get_pb_deseq2(seurat, sample_col = "sample.ID", black_list = "none")

plot_list[["p_pb_bio"]] <- plot_mds(dist(pb_norm), labels = meta[[bio_col]],
         cluster_score = F, mod_score = F, anosim_score = T,
         title = "Pseudobulk - Biological groups"
)
print(plot_list[["p_pb_bio"]])

plot_list[["p_pb_batch"]] <- plot_mds(dist(pb_norm), labels = meta[[batch_col]],
         cluster_score = F, mod_score = F, anosim_score = T,
```
